title: Product Delivery Issue
transcript:
Man: Hello, this is Mark from Apex Supplies. I'm calling about your order of office furniture.
Woman: Yes, I was just about to call you. The delivery was scheduled for yesterday, but nothing arrived.
Man: I apologize for the inconvenience. There was a delay at our warehouse. Your order will be delivered tomorrow morning.
Woman: That's a problem. We have a team starting a new project on Monday and they need desks and chairs.
Man: I understand. I've prioritized your order, so everything will arrive by 10 AM tomorrow. Our team will also handle the assembly.
Woman: That's very helpful. Will there be any additional charge for the assembly service?
Man: No, we'll include it at no extra cost given the delay.

questions.stem: Why is the woman concerned about the delivery delay?
options: A new team is starting a project on Monday
The office is moving next week
questions.explanation: The woman says a team is starting a new project on Monday and they need the desks and chairs.

questions.stem: When will the furniture be delivered?
questions.explanation: The man says everything will arrive by 10 AM tomorrow.

questions.stem: What additional service will be provided at no extra cost?
questions.explanation: The man offers to include the assembly service at no extra cost due to the delay.
